tips.name: HCL Technologies
tips.why: IT sector led Nifty moves on earnings; HCLTECH trades at a relative valuation discount to TCS/Infy with strong deal-win momentum in infrastructure services and a consistent dividend payout supporting near-term sentiment
tips.risk: Any management guidance cut on FY26 revenue growth or USD/INR strengthening below 83 would compress rupee-reported earnings and pressure the stock

tips.name: NTPC Ltd
tips.why: Power sector tailwind from India's record summer peak-demand; NTPC's renewable capacity addition pipeline (50 GW target by 2032) and government capex backing provide a medium-term re-rating catalyst distinct from POWERGRID (which you already hold)
tips.risk: Fuel-cost pass-through delays and slower-than-expected renewable commissioning could disappoint near-term earnings expectations

tips.name: Maruti Suzuki India
tips.why: Auto sector benefits from stable crude (lower input/logistics costs) and the festive pre-season channel restocking; Maruti's new SUV launches (Dzire, e-Vitara EV ramp) are near-term volume catalysts
tips.risk: Any sharp INR depreciation raises royalty/import-component costs, and a demand slowdown in rural India would disproportionately hurt volumes
